title: euphorbia ferdowsiana
intro: Euphorbia ferdowsiana, also known as the Ferdows Cactus or Persian Spurge, is a succulent plant species native to Iran. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin problems, and infections. The health benefits of Euphorbia ferdowsiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex is often extracted and used to make topical creams, ointments, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
